message:
feat(convoy): push completion notification to active Mayor session

When a convoy completes and convoy.notify_on_complete is enabled in town
settings, send a nudge to the Mayor session in addition to the existing
mail notifications. This gives the Mayor immediate awareness of convoy
completion without needing to check mail.

- Wire up NotifyOnComplete config read in notifyConvoyCompletion()
- Add `gt config set/get` commands for dot-notation config keys
- Support: convoy.notify_on_complete, cli_theme, default_agent
- Opt-in (default false): gt config set convoy.notify_on_complete true

Closes: gt-e1ar4
